title: Crisp Braised Fil with Pilaf
description: A tangy and savory dish featuring crisped fil in a braised sauce served with a side of flavorful pilaf.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add fil and cook until browned on both sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Transfer fil to a plate and set aside.
In the same skillet, add tangy and braised, and cook until heated through.
Add pilaf to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return fil to the skillet and simmer until cooked through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional chives if desired.
